route="/change/medicalnetwork/claimstatus/v2"><h1 class="text-[1.75em] font-semibold">Real-Time Claim Status (276/277) JSON</h1><p class="mb-8 text-lg text-primary">Submit a 276/277 real-time claim class="operation-target inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 p-1.5 no-underline hover:text-tertiary" href="/docs/healthcare/check-claim-status"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" href="https://github.com/Stedi/openApi/blob/main/healthcare.json#:~:text=&quot;operationId&quot;%3A%20&quot;ClaimStatus&quot;" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="18" height="18" fill="currentColor" class="remixicon text-tertiary"><path d="M4 18V14.3C4 13.4716 3.32843 12.8 2.5 12.8H2V11.2H2.5C3.32843 11.2 4 10.5284 4 9.7V6C4 4.34315 5.34315 3 7 3H8V5H7C6.44772 5 6 5.44772 6 6V10.1C6 10.9858 5.42408 11.7372 4.62623 12C5.42408 12.2628 6 13.0142 6 13.9V18C6 18.5523 6.44772 19 7 19H8V21H7C5.34315 21 4 19.6569 4 18ZM20 14.3V18C20 19.6569 18.6569 21 17 21H16V19H17C17.5523 19 18 18.5523 18 18V13.9C18 13.0142 18.5759 12.2628 19.3738 12C18.5759 11.7372 18 10.9858 18 10.1V6C18 5.44772 17.5523 5 17 5H16V3H17C18.6569 3 20 4.34315 20 6V9.7C20 10.5284 20.6716 11.2 21.5 11.2H22V12.8H21.5C20.6716 12.8 20 13.4716 20 14.3Z"></path></svg>OpenAPI spec</a></div></div></div><p>You may need to submit a 276 real-time claim status request when you don&#x27;t receive a 277CA claim acknowledgment or 835 Electronic Remittance Advice (ERA) response from the payer within your expected timeframe.</p>
<ol>
<li>Call this endpoint with a JSON payload.<!-- -->
<ul>
<li>The request must be for a production claim that has entered the payer&#x27;s processing system. Requests for test claims or claims that the payer hasn&#x27;t yet accepted won&#x27;t return results.</li>
<li>Providing too much information can negatively affect the results. You should start with our <a href="/docs/healthcare/check-claim-status#json-base-request">recommended base request</a>.</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Stedi generates the X12 276 EDI transaction and sends it to the payer.</li>
<li>The endpoint returns a synchronous 277 claim status response from the payer in JSON format. The response contains information about the claims matching the criteria you provided in the request and their current status.</li>
</ol>
<p>The response may contain information about more than one claim, if the payer has multiple claims on file that match the information you provided.</p><div class="flex items-end justify-between gap-2"><h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2 group api-section-heading-title" depth="2" slug="authorizations" id="authorizations"><a class="peer relative" data-card="" 13.4716 20 14.3Z"></path></svg>Object</span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>Information about the referenced claim or claims for which you want to retrieve status information.</p>
<ul>
<li>We recommend supplying a date range that is at least plus or minus 7 days from the date of the services listed in the claim, using the <code>beginningDateOfService</code> and <code>endDateOfService</code> properties. The payer may have stored a different date for the encounter than the one in your records, so providing a date range increases the likelihood that the payer will find a match.</li>
<li>Don&#x27;t submit future dates - only submit date ranges up to and including today&#x27;s date. Some payers reject requests containing future service dates.</li>
</ul><details class="[&amp;[open]&gt;summary&gt;.arrow-down-icon]:rotate-180 [&amp;[open]&gt;summary]:rounded-b-none [&amp;[open]]:rounded-b-md relative overflow-visible" data-path="body.encounter" to the claim status request. bg-transparent ring-1 ring-inset ring-neutral-300 dark:ring-neutral-700 text-neutral-700 dark:text-neutral-300 break-all">Items:<!-- --> <!-- -->1 - 2147483647</span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>Information about the billing provider and (optionally) service providers related to the referenced claim.</p>
<ul>
<li>Exactly one billing provider is <strong>required</strong> in this array. Requests that include only a service provider are rejected with a <code>400</code> error.</li>
<li>For each provider, you must set the <code>providerType</code> and one of the following identifiers: <code>npi</code>, <code>taxId</code>, or <code>etin</code>.</li>
<li>When the <code>providerType</code> = <code>BillingProvider</code>, we recommend setting <code>etin</code> as the identifier.</li>
</ul><details class="[&amp;[open]&gt;summary&gt;.arrow-down-icon]:rotate-180 [&amp;[open]&gt;summary]:rounded-b-none [&amp;[open]]:rounded-b-md relative overflow-visible" data-path="body.providers" Identification Number (ETIN). This identifier is preferred if the payer specifically assigned one for the provider. If not, most payers will accept the provider&#x27;s <a href="https://www.stedi.com/docs/healthcare/national-provider-identifier" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">NPI</a> or TIN instead.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none last:border-b overflow-visible [role=tabpanel]_&amp;:!border-none referenced claim.</p>
<ul>
<li>You must set both the <code>dateOfBirth</code> and <code>gender</code> properties when the subscriber is the patient unless the gender is unknown. Stedi determines that the subscriber is the patient when the <code>dependent</code> object is not included in the request.</li>
<li>If either <code>dateOfBirth</code> or <code>gender</code> is set, you must include both properties unless the gender is unknown.</li>
</ul><details class="[&amp;[open]&gt;summary&gt;.arrow-down-icon]:rotate-180 [&amp;[open]&gt;summary]:rounded-b-none [&amp;[open]]:rounded-b-md relative overflow-visible" data-path="body.subscriber" 9H17V11H3V9Z"></path></svg>String</span></div></div><div class="prose-no-margin pt-4 pb-4 empty:hidden text-[15px] leading-[24px]"><p>The status code used to identify the status of an entire claim or a service line. For example, <code>20</code> - Accepted for Processing.</p>
<p>This is either a Health Care Claim Status Code or a National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) Reject/Payment Code, when the status is related to pharmacy claims.</p>
<p>Visit [Claim Status Codes](<a href="https://x12.org/codes/claim-status-codes" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Health Care Claim Status Code</a> in the official X12 documentation or the <a href="https://ncpdp.org/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">NCPDP website</a> for a complete list of codes and their values.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property Phone numbers are formatted as AAABBBCCCC, where AAA represents the area code, BBB represents the telephone number prefix, and CCCC represents the telephone number. Phone numbers are provided without separators, such as dashes or parentheses. For example, <code>5551123345</code> for <code>555-112-3345</code>.</p></div></div><div class="text-sm border-t openapi-property scroll-mt-32 w-full p-3 border-x bg-fd-card first:rounded-t-none 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col shiki stedi-custom" style="background-color:#0A0A0A;color:#D4D4D4" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">{</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;claims&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">    {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;claimStatus&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;amountPaid&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;108.77&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;checkIssueDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20250717&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;checkNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;123456789&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;claimServiceDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20250701&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;effectiveDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20250717&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;paidDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20250715&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;patientAccountNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;12345678&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;statusCategoryCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;F1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;statusCategoryCodeValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Finalized/Payment - The claim/line has been paid.&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;statusCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;65&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;statusCodeValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Claim/line has been paid.&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;submittedAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;267.54&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;trackingNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;0123456789&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">        &quot;tradingPartnerClaimNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;0123456789&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">      },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;serviceDetails&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">        {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">          &quot;service&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;amountPaid&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;108.77&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;procedureId&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;90837&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;serviceIdQualifier&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Health Care Financing Administration Common Procedural Coding System (HCPCS) Codes&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;serviceIdQualifierCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;HC&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;submittedAmount&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;267.54&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">            &quot;submittedUnits&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">          },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">          &quot;status&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">            {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;effectiveDate&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;20250717&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;statusCategoryCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;F1&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;statusCategoryCodeValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Finalized/Payment - The claim/line has been paid.&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;statusCode&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;107&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">              &quot;statusCodeValue&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Processed according to contract provisions (Contract refers to provisions that exist between the Health Plan and a Provider of Health Care Services).&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">            }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">          ]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">        }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">      ]</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">  ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;controlNumber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;123456789&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;payer&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;organizationName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;UNITEDHEALTHCARE&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;payerIdentification&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;87726&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">  },</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;providers&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: [</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">    {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;npi&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;1999999984&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;organizationName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Provider Name&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">      &quot;providerType&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;BillingProvider&quot;</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">    }</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#D4D4D4">  ],</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">  &quot;subscriber&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;firstName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Jane&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;lastName&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;Doe&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">,</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="color:#3B82F6">    &quot;memberId&quot;</span><span style="color:#D4D4D4">: </span><span style="color:#CA8A04">&quot;UHC123456&quot;</span></span>
